nasb.text: Go up to the mountains, bring wood and rebuild the temple, that I may be pleased with it and be glorified,” says the Lord.

esv.text: Go up to the hills and bring wood and build the house, that I may take pleasure in it and that I may be glorified, says the Lord.

cnv.text: 你們要上山取木材，建造殿宇；我必因此喜悅，並且得榮耀。”耶和華說：

ccb.text: 你们要上山伐木，重建这殿，好让我欢喜并得到尊崇。这是耶和华说的。
